ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "chq_eft" TEXT /* Check or EFT identifier */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department making the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction purpose */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment status */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor or recipient */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_status_id") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the department entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the department entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES departments_budget ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment status (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment status entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment status entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction related to the action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment status */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance officer, auditor, administrator) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_budget" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated department */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Total budget amount for the department */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year for the budget */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the budget entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the budget entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_budget_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction type entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction type entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction linked to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment status */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction category entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction category entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction category entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction category entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions for the department */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount spent by the department */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the summary */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the summary entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the summary entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_summary_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vendor entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vendor entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the vendor entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vendor entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)
